***********************************
Updated Terms of Service Link Below
***********************************

**************
Dear Customer,
**************

We recently contacted you
regarding updates to our Terms of Service. In that email, we
mistakenly included a second link to our Global Transfers Terms
of Service instead of to the Terms of Service for your Paysend
Balance.

Please note that you can review the Terms of Service for both
Paysend Balance and Global Transfers here. 
( http://clicks.paysend.com/f/a/nJLw-gGkWzKW0ZkvDKyQkQ~~/AAAHahA~/_rY3km5cEMgypxkjBVB0PlWJN_QbzpcYtX5rndvzgGksm1GbHYCEpzZbEBV2EIJ3QSezPM8YWnHc94ynQ1SLViOAajLCm7Z3VwhRGMAjySuMWDVqvQr4RUhNfcDfhlltaku6xZ4iq_AZIhpzQb3alYYwJzSqkk-jlNo1U5rg5gofQlwL7u5uDZEUnFB8k4x3ES754JxL4enCCfygyr00ng~~ )


If you are a customer with an existing Multi-currency account,
the updated Terms of Service for Paysend Balance will apply from
26 July 2026. If you do not have a Multi-currency account, the
Terms of Service for Paysend Balance will apply once we make a
Paysend Balance available to you and you use it.

The updated Terms of Service for Global Transfer will apply from
the same date communicated to you in the previous email.

If you do not agree to these changes, please let us know before
the relevant set of terms apply.

Thank you for your understanding.

Paysend - Simple Money Transfer

Terms and Conditions 
( http://clicks.paysend.com/f/a/gPnPjNjaJong_u65GtwsKw~~/AAAHahA~/ZKcdnzRHTdsbg0quEatXsN7vxtJ-40bZWw0HefMZ-Xz2KeC9csNSjDpingGoeqjbPvp8WcTDV6TT8E-zZ4DstVZMouDnX2b3KhL6efOVflSxLcc3-ZSMe3PS63ISAGWCrIazjdziYeXjNOEtIU2qFg~~ ).

73616.subject: The AI bill Uber can't justify
73616.body:
----------
######                      [Sign Up](http://utm.genai.works/r/gg2ubr5) | [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Uber runs on AI, and now its own COO says he can't justify what it costs. The company blew through its entire 2026 Claude Code budget weeks ago and still can't draw a line from all those tokens to better rides. Spotify, meanwhile, wants you to generate your own podcasts from a prompt. Microsoft set 100 AI agents loose on its own code to hunt security bugs. And the Pope put out 245 paragraphs on AI with an Anthropic co-founder standing right next to him.

———————————————————————————

**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Uber's AI bill:** Why can't the company connect its AI spend to anything useful?

* **Spotify's AI podcasts:** Would you let Spotify generate a private podcast just for you?

* **Microsoft MDASH:** What happens when 100 AI agents go hunting for security bugs?

* **Pope x Anthropic:** Why is an Anthropic co-founder standing next to the Pope?


----------

----------
## [Uber's COO says the AI spend isn't adding up](https://www.businessinsider.com/uber-coo-andrew-macdonald-ai-token-spending-harder-justify-2026-5)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c15a7957-546a-46c4-aa5b-678dc6f9af5c/ChatGPT_Image_May_26__2026__11_56_19_AM.png?t=1779787034)
Caption: 

Uber's COO says it's hard to justify money spent on tokenmaxxing. They're not seeing proportional productivity gains from the increasing AI costs. 

News like this doesn't exist in a bubble. We talked about how Microsoft is stopping its engineers from using Claude for the same reason.

The exec is Andrew Macdonald, Uber's operations chief. He said the trouble started after CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga told The Information in April that Uber had already burned through its entire Claude Code budget for 2026. 

Macdonald called it a "head-exploding moment." More tokens went in, but he can't draw a line from that spending to more useful features for riders. 

Btw, Duolingo learned that the hard way and pulled AI usage out of its performance reviews after staff pushed back.


----------

----------
==_Special highlight from our network_==

## [The resume gap costing you interviews.](https://link.genai.works/RzTY)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d8ac78b5-c225-4bb5-996d-4267cf873262/image.png?t=1779788048)
Follow image link: (https://

73612.subject: Reminder: Acceptance of Autopay Mobility Terms of Use Required
73612.body:
Autopay [https://mailing.autopay.eu/email_marketing_click.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&lc=o7&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=goaOWQg&] 
Reminder: Acceptance of Autopay Mobility Terms of Use Required





Dear Autopay customer,

We would like to inform you about the new terms of use for Autopay Mobility, covering changes to billing rules and an expanded range of available services.






What do you need to do?
To continue using paid services in the Autopay app, please accept the new Price List.
Until your consent is provided, automatic services (e.g. motorway tolls, automatic parking) will be suspended.

I accept the new terms [https://app.autopay.pl/regulation-acceptance/8e52ddc72cb34af597e041e6e01c8bae] 




What is changing?

We are expanding the range of services
We are launching city parking payments in over 100 cities in Poland via the Autopay app.
Pay for parking with one click - no cash, no parking meters, and no need to remember to extend your parking time. All charges and billing history will be available in one place together with your other Autopay services.

We are standardizing billing rules for all users
From that date, service fees will be charged regardless of the number of vehicles added. The current rules that excluded fees for accounts with one vehicle will no longer apply.

We are adjusting the invoice delivery method for business users
We have introduced changes to how invoices are delivered to business users so that the process complies with applicable legal regulations and the requirements of the National e-Invoicing System (KSeF).





The full content of the new terms of use can be found in the Terms and Conditions [https://mailing.autopay.eu/email_marketing_click.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&lc=om&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=gaAv3S0&] and Price List [https://mailing.autopay.eu/email_marketing_click.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&lc=oJ&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=g8v28je&].
Please also note that in connection with the change to the Autopay terms of use, as a consumer you have the right to terminate the agreement in accordance with the rules set out in the Terms and Conditions.
If you have any questions about these changes, please visit the Help section or contact our support team.





Best regards,
Autopay Team


This message has been sent in accordance with the Autopay terms and conditions, by Autopay Mobility Sp. z o.o. with its registered office in Sopot, ul. Powstańców Warszawy 6, 81-718 Sopot, registered in the District Court Gdańsk-Północ, 8th Commercial Division of the National Court Register under No. 0000794787, NIP 527-28-98-696, REGON 383879060. Share capital PLN 19,296,050.00. If you are not the intended recipient of this message, please notify us and delete the message without opening any attachments.



Aby się wypisać przejdź do:
https://mailing.autopay.eu/unsubscribe.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&m=tY&mc=o&s=pT7j&u=t&z=gnBioPS&
Aby zmienić swoje dane kontaktowe przejdź do:
https://mailing.autopay.eu/change_details.html?x=a62e&co=Sn3P&m=tY&s=pT7j&u=t&z=gSrDaBS&

73611.subject: Action required: Set up Biometric Verification
73611.body:
Anti-phishing Code 

Dear User,

As part of EU regulatory compliance, you are required to set up Biometric Verification on your device.

Biometric Verification adds an extra layer of security and allows you to complete actions such as withdrawals and transfers more efficiently. To avoid any interruption to your account features, please go to your account settings and complete the setup.

For step-by-step instructions, visit this page. } .header-logo { width: 42px !important; height: 42px !important; max-width: 42px !important; max-height: 42px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .title_text { font-size: 36px !important;
